reviews.comment:
Muy atento y agradable Gianfranco en 2 ocasiones q he ido en el turno mañana de los Domingos, salvo la mañana de hoy que el chico llamado Rodrigo que atiende nos resulto muy desagradable en el ofrecimiento de cafe y el rato de estadia, ponia la musica de su gusto muy alta como para mantener una charla con mi pareja y al realizarle consultas del baño y del diario para leer, nos señalo con desgano y mala cara..

(Translated by Google)
Gianfranco was very attentive and pleasant on the two occasions I've been there on Sunday mornings, except for this morning when the young man named Rodrigo who works there was very unpleasant. He was uncooperative when offering coffee and during our time there, playing his favorite music too loudly to have a conversation with my partner. When we asked him about the bathroom and the newspaper to read, he pointed us off with a sour face.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwcEtla01BEAE
